channel.title: Generativeai on Aman Ahuja
channel.description: Recent content in Generativeai on Aman Ahuja

item.title: Emergence Project: Representing a Textual Discourse
item.description:
Originally published on my old blog, Pafnuty blog. Reposted here as an effort to consolidate writing into one place. The original publication date was: January 15, 2009.

Reposted June 2026. The images and links don’t work anymore. But for those interested, see this paper from Daniel Sauter, Univ of Illinois at Chicago, on the Emergence Project and the art installation: https://web.archive.org/web/20170808194257id_/http://emergenceproject.org/blog/wp-content/uploads/2009/01/emergence_project_paper_sauter_lowres.pdf

(Image unavailable)

The Emergence Project [emergenceproject.org] is a “software art” installation exhibited at Hyde Park Art Center’s digital building facade gallery. It is based on the ideas and textual discourse that emanated out of the Chicago Humanities Festival: its presentations, performances, and panel discussions were captured, analyzed, and processed into a set of dynamic data visualizations that evolve dynamically over time.
